mentions.note: Bitcoin proxy soared in risk-on rally; sentiment shift from Iran de-escalation; high-risk capital flowing back.
Major cryptocurrencies everywhere now; Bitcoin volatility and failure as store of value hurt proxy story; won't touch this one.
Bitcoin rumors may have stabilized crypto creating relief on margin calls; Coinbase tied to Bitcoin volatility but crypto's loss of trust limits upside.
Crypto derivatives speculation evaporating; part of 'Year of Magical Thinking' playbook Cramer warned about; era ending as capital rotates to real earners.
